meaning: n.风格,时尚,文体,风度,类型,字体vt.称呼,设计,使合潮流 使铁笔作装饰画
examples: He had a dense, ponderous style.
Her style is pared-down and simple.
Her style of dress was never conservative.
As a result, the silks have now achieved recognition from the style-conscious shoppers of Singapore.
Google , too, is a Cheap Revolutionary, running on hundreds of thousands of PC-style Linux servers.
